headline: Exelon Stock Check As ComEd Hits US$10b Renewable Credit Milestone
summary: ComEd, a subsidiary of Exelon, has surpassed $10b in Renewable Energy Credits under contract in Illinois. The milestone reflects growing participation in clean energy programs and expanded renewable infrastructure across the state. This development ties directly to Exelon’s focus on supporting decarbonization and customer access to renewables. Exelon (NasdaqGS:EXC) is drawing fresh attention as ComEd’s REC portfolio crosses the $10b mark, highlighting the role of its regulated utilities in...
